content.title: NOTICE
content.body: The Opening Market Auction Call has been further extended to restore the active accounts which were suspended. Trading will commence at 11 a.m.

content.title: Notice
content.body: Opening Market Auction Call has been further extended.

content.title: System Maintenance Notice
content.body: The CSE Mobile App and associated services including CDS Account Opening/CDS E-Connect and MyCSE portal on the CSE Website will be unavailable from 8:00 PM on 12th June 2026 until 1:00 PM 13th June 2026 due to a planned system maintenance.
